message:
Command `echo "=== Find actual ABC binary process ==="
# Look for yosys-abc binary (not bash wrapper)  
ps aux | grep -i "abc" | grep -v grep | grep -v bash | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== ABC script content ==="
cat /tmp/yosys-abc-4f2qC7/abc.script

echo ""
echo "=== Check children of yosys process ==="
pstree -p 363476 2>/dev/null | head -10 || ps --ppid $(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" | head -1) -o pid,stat,comm 2>/dev/null | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "echo "=== Find actual ABC binary process ==="
# Look for yosys-abc binary (not bash wrapper)  
ps aux | grep -i "abc" | grep -v grep | grep -v bash | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== ABC script content ==="
cat /tmp/yosys-abc-4f2qC7/abc.script

echo ""
echo "=== Check children of yosys process ==="
pstree -p 363476 2>/dev/null | head -10 || ps --ppid $(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" | head -1) -o pid,stat,comm 2>/dev/null | head -5", "timeout": 10}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== Find actual ABC binary process ===

=== ABC script content ===

=== Check children of yosys process ===
cat: /tmp/yosys-abc-4f2qC7/abc.script: No such file or directory

extras.command:
echo "=== Find actual ABC binary process ==="
# Look for yosys-abc binary (not bash wrapper)  
ps aux | grep -i "abc" | grep -v grep | grep -v bash | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== ABC script content ==="
cat /tmp/yosys-abc-4f2qC7/abc.script

echo ""
echo "=== Check children of yosys process ==="
pstree -p 363476 2>/dev/null | head -10 || ps --ppid $(pgrep -f "yosys.*synthesize" | head -1) -o pid,stat,comm 2>/dev/null | head -5
